title: Moons Simple Swords
description:
This texture pack changes the swords to be simple. 
[slight tool change]
body:
This wonderful pack changes all sword types to be simple (yet better)
  changes swords to have iron hilts and fully wooden handles and a very pretty gradient of the original color for the blades.

I recoment that you use this sword pack with my other pack (moons simple bedwars) sence it was made to fit the theme.

(small changes for the tools and fishing rod.)

Thank you to "progamer49" for sugesting this! and to "Memeinq" for helping me with gallery 

(any sugestions? email me here: radar-fetch-feel@duck.com or add me on Hypixel  "wowmoonwow" is my in game name!)

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
